mapper.select: SELECT i.product_id AS goodsId, COALESCE(MAX(g.name), MAX(i.product_name_snapshot), CONCAT('ID:', i.product_id)) AS goodsName, SUM(i.quantity) AS qty, SUM(i.subtotal) AS amount FROM sal_order_item i INNER JOIN sal_order o ON o.id = i.order_id LEFT JOIN goods g ON g.id = i.product_id WHERE o.status NOT IN (3, 50) GROUP BY i.product_id ORDER BY SUM(i.quantity) DESC

SELECT i.product_id AS goodsId, COALESCE(MAX(g.name), MAX(si.product_name_snapshot), CONCAT('ID:', i.product_id)) AS goodsName, SUM(i.quantity) AS qty, NULL AS amount FROM sale_outbound_item i INNER JOIN sale_outbound ob ON ob.id = i.outbound_id LEFT JOIN goods g ON g.id = i.product_id LEFT JOIN sal_order_item si ON si.id = i.sale_order_item_id WHERE ob.status = 1 GROUP BY i.product_id ORDER BY SUM(i.quantity) DESC

SELECT pi.goods_id AS goodsId, COALESCE(MAX(g.name), CONCAT('ID:', pi.goods_id)) AS goodsName, SUM(pi.quantity) AS qty, SUM(pi.amount) AS amount FROM purchase_item pi LEFT JOIN goods g ON g.id = pi.goods_id GROUP BY pi.goods_id ORDER BY SUM(pi.quantity) DESC

SELECT ii.goods_id AS goodsId, COALESCE(MAX(g.name), CONCAT('ID:', ii.goods_id)) AS goodsName, SUM(ii.quantity) AS qty, NULL AS amount FROM purchase_inbound_item ii INNER JOIN purchase_inbound ib ON ib.id = ii.inbound_id LEFT JOIN goods g ON g.id = ii.goods_id WHERE ib.status = 1 GROUP BY ii.goods_id ORDER BY SUM(ii.quantity) DESC

SELECT inv.goods_id AS goodsId, COALESCE(MAX(g.name), CONCAT('ID:', inv.goods_id)) AS goodsName, SUM(inv.qty_on_hand) AS qty, NULL AS amount FROM inventory inv LEFT JOIN goods g ON g.id = inv.goods_id GROUP BY inv.goods_id ORDER BY SUM(inv.qty_on_hand) DESC
